label: GLSL vignette pass — stable depth falloff replacing ramp_depth/comp_depth
notes: ramp_depth+comp_depth disappeared on every project reload. Replaced with glsl_vignette: a passthrough GLSL shader that reads comp_shimmer and applies a portrait-corrected radial multiply (smoothstep(0.55,1.15,r) ^ 1.4). Aspect correction: centered.x *= 720/1280 before length(). GLSL compile error fixed: TD auto-declares sTD2DInputs — cannot redeclare it.

operations.note: Radial vignette shader: reads sTD2DInputs[0], computes aspect-corrected r, applies 1-smoothstep(0.55,1.15,r) pow 1.4 multiply
